subject: Leadership
description: K-12 Leadership & Problem-Solving curriculum with scenario-driven lessons

lessons.title: Captain of the Storm
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You are the captain of a research vessel caught in a deadly storm. Your crew looks to you for decisions that will save everyone.

lessons.title: Laboratory Escape
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You are an inventor trapped in your own laboratory. Solve logic puzzles to escape before the self-destruct sequence completes.

lessons.title: Crisis Mediator
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: Two rival student councils are on the brink of violence. Your mediation skills will determine the outcome.

lessons.title: Innovation Challenge
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You lead a startup team. Design a product pitch that solves a real community problem.

lessons.title: Ethics Dilemma
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You are a CEO facing a moral crossroads. Your choices define your leadership legacy.

lessons.title: Debate Champion
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You are training for the national debate championship. Persuade the judges with logical arguments.

lessons.title: Peace Builder
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You are a UN peacekeeper. Negotiate a ceasefire between two warring factions.

lessons.title: Visionary Founder
lessons.subject: Leadership
lessons.storyHook: You are building the next world-changing company. Recruit a team, pitch investors, and scale globally.
